action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 13 took 18 minutes and we only have 20.7 minutes left. We must do one final run. Analysis: The best performance (0.705) was achieved in Iteration 5 with 25 epochs, tau=1.2, custom Mixup, and OneCycleLR. I will revert exactly to those settings for the final run to maximize the score before time runs out. Decision: Train for 25 epochs with the optimal hyperparameters and submit the final evaluation.
